summary.lv: Giraffe360, kas izstrādā mākslīgajā intelektā balstītu kameru un saturu nekustamo īpašumu nozarei un apkalpo klientus 40+ valstīs, meklē vecāko produkta dizaineri Rīgas komandai.
summary.en: Giraffe360 — building an AI-powered camera and content platform for real estate, serving customers in 40+ countries — is hiring a Senior Product Designer for its Riga team.
